product_overview: Backend API surface exposing MockBook (folders, categories, mock tests) and Super Admin controls for multi-organization EdTech platform. Provides authenticated CRUD for org-scoped content, plus endpoints used by personalization and admin tooling.
core_goals: Provide secure, org-scoped CRUD for mock test content (folders, categories, tests) with role-based access controls.
Expose Super Admin management APIs for cross-org mock test operations and organization inspection.
Support student personalization workflows (unlock, auto-set generation, study plans) with server-side validation and limits.
Ensure robust error handling for schema migration risks and clear client-facing error responses.
Keep APIs compatible with multi-tenant rules: orgId never trusted from frontend and validated from JWT.

features.name: MockBook Management API
features.description: CRUD operations for exam folders and test series (categories) used by org admins and public MockVeda; supports listing and creation with auth where required.
user_flows: POST /api/mockbook/folders with Authorization: Bearer <OrgStaffJWT> and body {name, parentId?} -> Receive 201 Created with folder object {id, name, path, orgId}
GET /api/mockbook/folders -> Receive 200 OK with an array of folders (public/global + org folders) including the newly created folder
POST /api/mockbook/categories with Authorization: Bearer <OrgStaffJWT> and body {name, folderId, examType} -> Receive 201 Created with category/test-series object
GET /api/mockbook/categories?folderId=<folderId> -> Receive 200 OK with list of categories/test-series under the folder
POST /api/mockbook/folders without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized
POST /api/mockbook/categories with Authorization: Bearer <OrgStaffJWT> and body {name, folderId} where folderId does not exist -> Receive 404 Not Found with validation error
GET /api/mockbook/folders -> Receive 500 Internal Server Error due to recent schema hierarchy sync issue (known limitation) -> Client shows retry suggestion and reports error

features.name: Super Admin Mockbook & Organization API
features.description: Super Admin endpoints to list/create mock tests for a given organization and retrieve organization details; requires Super Admin JWT and enforces elevated permissions.
user_flows: GET /api/super-admin/mockbook/GK-ORG-00234/tests with Authorization: Bearer <SuperAdminJWT> -> Receive 200 OK with array of mock tests for organization GK-ORG-00234

POST /api/super-admin/mockbook/GK-ORG-00234/tests with Authorization: Bearer <SuperAdminJWT> and body {title, sections, schedule, isPublic} -> Receive 201 Created with mock test object {testId, orgId, status}
GET /api/super-admin/organizations/GK-ORG-00234 with Authorization: Bearer <SuperAdminJWT> -> Receive 200 OK with organization details {id, name, plan, featureFlags}
GET /api/super-admin/mockbook/GK-ORG-00234/tests with Authorization: Bearer <OrgStaffJWT> (not SuperAdmin) -> Receive 403 Forbidden
POST /api/super-admin/mockbook/invalid-org/tests with Authorization: Bearer <SuperAdminJWT> and body {title,...} -> Receive 404 Not Found (organization id invalid) with error message

features.name: Student Personalization APIs
features.description: APIs to check unlock status, generate student auto-sets, and manage study-plan related actions. Enforces unlock thresholds, active set limits and expiration rules described in product policy.
user_flows: GET /api/personalization/status with Authorization: Bearer <StudentJWT> -> Receive 200 OK with {unlocked: false, testsCompleted: 38, threshold: 50}

POST /api/personalization/auto-set with Authorization: Bearer <StudentJWT> and body {timeRange:30, mode:'Weak Only', size:50} when unlocked -> Receive 201 Created with {setId, expiresAt, status:'Pending'}
GET /api/personalization/sets?studentId=GK-STU-00001 with Authorization: Bearer <StudentJWT> -> Receive 200 OK with list of student's active and past practice sets

POST /api/personalization/auto-set with Authorization: Bearer <StudentJWT> and body {timeRange:7, mode:'Weak Only', size:25} when not unlocked -> Receive 403 Forbidden with message 'Personalization locked: require 50 completed tests'
POST /api/personalization/auto-set with Authorization: Bearer <StudentJWT> and body {...} when student already has 10 active sets -> Receive 400 Bad Request with message 'Max 10 active sets allowed'

features.name: Super Admin API

known_limitations.issue: Recent schema changes for hierarchy might cause sync issues
known_limitations.impact: Potential 500 errors if database is not fully migrated
